title: Michals Origins
description: Michals Origins introduces Hatsune Miku as a playable origin, granting players unique abilities inspired by the iconic Vocaloid.
body:
Unleash your inner pop idol with the Miku Origin, a custom origin inspired by the iconic Hatsune Miku! Join the world of Minecraft as a digital diva with unique abilities and limitations. Are you ready to fly, perform, and shine like never before? 🌟🎤



Abilities

🎤 Vocal Flight:
With the power of your voice and music, you can take to the skies! Activate your flight ability to soar through the air like the idol you are. Perfect for dazzling performances or reaching high places! (Be mindful of your energy levels—flying drains power fast!)

🔋 Star Power Charge:
Recharge your energy by standing on copper blocks! Harness your digital energy from the metal beneath your feet to keep performing at your best. Without power, you'll deactivate (self-destruct), so always keep an eye on your energy reserves.

💥 Self-Destruct:
When your energy is completely depleted or on command, unleash a final encore explosion! This dramatic ability deals damage to nearby enemies and gives you a quick reset—but beware, it comes at a cost.

💎 Extra Armor Points:
As a digital entity, your shimmering outfit provides extra protection! Enjoy additional armor points to keep yourself safe from harm while you're performing.

Weaknesses

⛔ Can't Run:
As a Miku-inspired origin, you rely on grace and performance—not speed. Running is disabled, so you'll have to walk elegantly or take to the skies to travel.

⚡ Energy Dependent:
Flying, self-destructing, and other abilities consume energy. Manage your power carefully to avoid unexpected deactivation during critical moments.

Playstyle

The Miku Origin offers a balanced mix of power and challenge for players who enjoy unique, thematic gameplay. Whether you're exploring new heights, charging power on copper blocks, or dazzling friends with your idol-like presence, this origin is sure to make your adventures unforgettable!

Are you ready to bring the concert to Minecraft? ✨🎶
